---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: halim-23
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Atlassian API

Which Atlassian REST API endpoint would this cover?

- API: (e.g. Jira / Confluence)
- Endpoint: (e.g. `GET /rest/api/3/issue/{issueKey}/changelog`)
- Docs: (link to Atlassian developer docs)

## Use Case

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Tool Name

Suggested MCP tool name (e.g. `jira_get_issue_changelog`).

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
